mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO COACHING_MESSAGE ( MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, THREAD_ID, ROLE, CONTENT, CATEGORY, ORIGINAL_AMOUNT, AVG_AMOUNT, ACCEPTED ) VALUES ( nextval('SEQ_COACHING'), #{userId},
currval('SEQ_COACHING') #{threadId} , #{role}, #{content}, #{category}, #{originalAmount}, #{avgAmount}, #{accepted} )
mapper.select: SELECT MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, THREAD_ID, ROLE, CONTENT, CATEGORY, ORIGINAL_AMOUNT, AVG_AMOUNT, ACCEPTED, CREATED_AT FROM COACHING_MESSAGE WHERE THREAD_ID = #{threadId} ORDER BY MESSAGE_ID ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (CATEGORY) MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, THREAD_ID, ROLE, CONTENT, CATEGORY, ORIGINAL_AMOUNT, AVG_AMOUNT, ACCEPTED, CREATED_AT FROM COACHING_MESSAGE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ROLE = 'NUDGE' ORDER BY CATEGORY, MESSAGE_ID DESC ) latest_per_category ORDER BY MESSAGE_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

SELECT MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, THREAD_ID, ROLE, CONTENT, CATEGORY, ORIGINAL_AMOUNT, AVG_AMOUNT, ACCEPTED, CREATED_AT FROM COACHING_MESSAGE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ROLE = 'NUDGE' AND CATEGORY = #{category} AND ORIGINAL_AMOUNT = #{originalAmount} AND CREATED_AT::date = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY MESSAGE_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, THREAD_ID, ROLE, CONTENT, CATEGORY, ORIGINAL_AMOUNT, AVG_AMOUNT, ACCEPTED, CREATED_AT FROM COACHING_MESSAGE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ROLE = 'NUDGE' AND CATEGORY = #{categoryKey} AND CREATED_AT::date = CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY MESSAGE_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
